result: Designed canonical plan for Event Taxonomy Enforcement (Phases 1-2). Produced plan artifact at docs/json/opencode/plans/rl-003-event-taxonomy-foundation.v1.json. Key findings: (1) Only 1 of 3 'hyphenated' names is actually hyphenated (installation.update-available) — audit incorrectly flagged message.part.delta and vcs.branch.updated which use proper dot notation. (2) event-names.ts leaf module design with zero imports from event-defining modules. (3) Two-step BusEvent.define() validation: runtime warning first (additive/non-breaking), compile-time constraint deferred post-migration. (4) Zero subscriber breakage — consumers use definition objects, not strings. (5) 6 test/app files and 3 SDK gen files need updating for the single rename.
